kind: owner-authorized UCF-Crime access verification; not a research result
package_match_basis: The Kaggle listing exposes the UCF_Crimes layout and Temporal_Anomaly_Annotation_for_Testing_Videos text release.
The local package has the matching UCF_Crimes layout, 1950 source-video containers, the text-format release, 290 MATLAB interval files, and a successful full frame-to-interval mapping.
owner_approval_statement: Owner authorizes use of the verified Kaggle mirror for internal non-commercial SHAR research; raw media, annotations, and derived crops may not be redistributed; upstream footage rights remain qualified.
email_handling: The authenticated account email was supplied by the owner but is intentionally not stored in this repository.
